rdf:Description.dc:description: Four-panel schematic of foundation model variations (manuscript submitted Fig 9): (a) Fixed Base with rigid foundation; (b) Macro-Element 6x6 stiffness at the reference node; (c) BNWF with uniform spring distribution along each bucket skirt; (d) BNWF with distributed springs from the proposed framework (depth-varying stiffness). B&W-safe via rigid-block fill + coil spring annotation.
